title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IndusInd Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
